Title: ZK Proof Verification is No-Op
Description: verify_zk_proof_internal only checks proof format (192 bytes non-zero root). No actual BLS12-381 Groth16 pairing verification performed.
Notes: Requires full Groth16 implementation using Protocol 26 host functions

Title: Integer Division Truncation in amount_per_second
Description: amount / duration truncates to 0 when amount < duration. Stream silently dropped while employer's total_amount transferred.
Notes: Guard added: reject batch when amount_per_second == 0

Title: Unchecked Integer Overflow
Description: sum += amt and (amount_per_second as u64 * elapsed) as i128 can overflow/truncate
Notes: Replaced with checked_add and u128 checked_mul

Title: Unchecked Overflow in calculate_accrued
Description: (amount_per_second as u64 * effective_elapsed) as i128 can overflow
Notes: Replaced with u128 checked_mul + i128::MAX cap

Title: No overflow-checks in Release Profile
Description: Workspace Cargo.toml missing overflow-checks=true in release profile

Title: Bare .unwrap() calls
Description: Vec::get().unwrap() panics without descriptive error context
Notes: Replace with ok_or(Error) for production hardening

Title: Unused trusted_hash variable
Description: _trusted_hash fetched from storage but never compared against proof
Notes: Documented as part of ZK stub with security note

Title: deposit_to_source is no-op
Description: External yield source deposit function is empty placeholder for MVP
Notes: Will call Blend/Soroswap deposit in production
